title: firtool misses `regreset` when generating .mlir from .fir with --preserve-aggregate=vec and array registers

features.name: procedural register with async reset using vector type
features.description: Code should include a procedural always block with asynchronous reset operating on a unpacked vector/array data type
features.snippet:
logic [1:0] q [1][1];
always @(posedge clk or negedge reset) begin if (~reset) q <= '0; else q <= d; end
